Fashor — strict 86% ✓ | affinity 96% ✓ | ₹109 avg |ΔPrice|

Fashor Ethnic Wear Analysis (H&M-trained tower)

Reranked strict cat-match: 86% — ✓ Strong

Ethnic avg (strict): 77%  |  Western avg (strict): 45%

The item tower (CLIP ViT-B/32 + SBERT) was trained on H&M western-fashion interactions. Kurta/ethnic categories are out-of-distribution for the user tower but CLIP's visual embeddings still capture garment shape, color, and texture — so similarity within ethnic categories depends entirely on visual+text alignment, not interaction-based fine-tuning.

  • Kurta: 40% (2 queries)
  • Kurta Set: 60% (3 queries)
  • 2P Kurta Set: 92% (28 queries)
  • Kurtas: 93% (12 queries)
  • 3P Kurta Set: 99% (40 queries)
